Add to Home Screen
Install as an app -- works offline, full screen

⚙️ Settings & API Key
Claude API key — required for AI Overlay, Blueprint AI, AI Stencil, and Permit Notes. Stored locally in your browser, never sent to our servers.
Google Gemini key ("Nano Banana") — optional, enables the AI map stencil redraw. Get one at aistudio.google.com. Stored locally only.
Company Branding
The company proposing this project. Appears on every customer-facing export (proposal, analysis, one-line, BOM).
Logo
PNG / JPG / SVG · shown on proposal cover & exports. Kept under ~500KB.
Monday.com Integration
Push this project's task board straight to Monday. Your token stays in this browser and is only ever sent to Monday.
Get a token in Monday → avatar → Developers → My Access Tokens. No token? Use "Export to Monday" for a CSV instead.

Toggle incentives that apply to this project. Values reduce the net project cost.
ComEd BESH (Battery Energy Storage Honorarium) -- $250/kWh C&I of nameplate capacity.
✓ STANDALONE storage qualifies -- solar pairing NOT required (IL CEJA, Public Act 102-0662, eff. 2022)
C&I customers must enroll in the BESH rate plan and participate in ComEd demand response / peak load reduction program as a condition of rebate. Pre-approval required before installation.

⚙ BMS Charge Throttle
FOM/FR projects: install full nameplate capacity -> maximize CEJA incentive -> BMS limits charge rate to satisfy IEEE 1547 / ComEd interconnection screen. PJM then dispatches within BMS limits.
BMS charge rate limit (kW) -- feeder screen uses this instead of ¼ nameplate:
kW max charge
Investor note: CEJA incentive is on nameplate kWh -- not operating kWh. BMS charge limiting satisfies IEEE 1547 / ComEd interconnection screen for FOM systems. PJM RegD dispatch operates within BMS charge limits. Full discharge capacity available for frequency regulation response.
🧩 Integrated on the BESS pad
Check what ships on the container pad. Guided Build will skip the separate device and re-route the conduit so the chain stays continuous (battery → EMS → meter → POI).

📋 Export to Proposal Generator
Project data ready to load into the BESS Proposal Generator
How to use:
1. Click Copy JSON below -- or Download .json file
2. Open the '+brandName()+' BESS Proposal Generator
3. Paste into "Or paste JSON data" field and click ⚡ Parse & Auto-Fill
All BESS units, conduit runs, and equipment will auto-populate.

🏢 Company Information
📐 Title Block Information
Drawing Style
ComEd Northern Illinois
⚡ BESH Program -- Submittal Checklist
Battery Energy Storage Honorarium . DG Smart Inverter Rebate . $250/kWh C&I
Program Summary
• Rebate amount: $250/kWh (C&I) to $300/kWh (residential / small commercial) of nameplate storage capacity • Standalone eligibility: ✅ Standalone BESS qualifies WITHOUT solar -- solar pairing requirement removed by IL CEJA (Public Act 102-0662, eff. Sept 2021). Solar is optional. • Customer type: All commercial customers in ComEd service territory (northern Illinois) qualify -- businesses, nonprofits, institutions • Rate plan: C&I customers must enroll in BESH rate plan upon rebate acceptance (required condition) • Demand response: C&I customers must participate in ComEd peak load reduction / demand response program (required condition per Rider SDVPP/BYODLR) • Pre-approval: Required BEFORE installation -- submit pre-approval application first to reserve rebate amount • Stacking: Stacks with Federal ITC 30% (IRA §48E) + MACRS 5-yr depreciation + potential IL Shines if solar added later • Payment timing: Paid after installation verification and meter confirmation . 60-90 day processing typical • ITC interaction: Utility rebates generally do NOT reduce ITC basis -- confirm with tax advisor • Program authority: ComEd Tariff Rider SDVPP/BYODLR . ICC Docket 25-0678 . IL CEJA Public Act 102-0662

📐 S1.1 Custom Drawing Upload (optional)
Upload PE-stamped drawings to replace the generated diagrams on S1.1 BESS Pad Details. Leave empty to use the auto-generated engineering drawings.
🏗 S3.0 Fencing Drawing Upload (optional)
Upload your fencing drawings to replace the generated diagrams on S3.0. Leave empty to use the auto-generated views.
⚙️ S1.2 Gear Pad Drawing Upload (optional)
Upload PE-stamped drawings to replace the generated diagrams on S1.2 Gear Pad Details.
🗺 Site Map Source (for Plot Plan sheets)
Three modes -- use any combination:
1️⃣ Google Maps / Satellite -- loaded live in the canvas (address entered above)
2️⃣ Site Schematic Upload -- ALTA/survey/site plan PDF screenshot (use 📐 Site Schematic panel in left sidebar) with optional Claude AI overlay
3️⃣ Canvas Drawing -- place BESS equipment, conduit, bollards in editor; captured automatically
